title: ICU Capacity Unavailable Before Transfer
scenario: An ICU transfer is authorized, but ICU capacity becomes unavailable before execution.
initial_state: The transfer was authorized while ICU capacity was expected.
state_transition: ICU capacity disappears before transfer execution.
execution_boundary: The ICU transfer is evaluated immediately before execution.
constitutional_evaluation: Execution requires current availability of required destination care resources.
constitutional_basis: Execution is inadmissible because required ICU capacity is unavailable.
proof_conclusion: Clinical execution must fail closed when required ICU resources are unavailable.
